summary: Full testing of DatabasePage and Settings/Recordatorios features. All backend APIs return 200. UI renders correctly with glassmorphism design. Telegram/ntfy toggles expand with correct input fields. Test buttons call correct endpoints and show proper error messages when credentials not configured.
critical_code_review_comments: Telegram/ntfy toggles don't have data-testid on the buttons that contain them - the custom button (not radix Switch) uses data-testid='telegram-toggle', which works fine
backup/history API returns a plain list (not {backups: [...]}) - frontend should handle this correctly (verified working)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: DatabasePage loads with backup history (7 backups), CSV/JSON/PDF export buttons present, Settings/Ajustes loads without errors (motion import fixed), Telegram Bot and ntfy.sh toggles expand correctly showing token/chatid/topic inputs and Probar buttons. API /api/telegram/test and /api/ntfy/test return appropriate 'configure token first' error messages when credentials not set. The only thing pending is user configuring actual Telegram/ntfy credentials.
